predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: I seriously doubt [Hunter Biden's daughter] Navy will show up at the White House.
predictions.context: Mary Lou is ranting about President Biden acknowledging a grandchild after four years. She is skeptical this new grandchild will be treated like the others.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: In about one year... [Hunter Biden] could be in prison.
predictions.context: Continuing her rant about Hunter Biden, Mary Lou predicts his legal troubles will lead to imprisonment.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Your crops are going to dry up and fly away.
predictions.context: Bob is responding to a listener question about California seceding. He predicts California's agricultural collapse.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: He [Bernie Sanders] will have a moment [of cognitive decline like McConnell or Feinstein].
predictions.context: During a discussion on aging politicians, Bob predicts the 81-year-old Senator Bernie Sanders will eventually show similar signs of cognitive decline.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Next week, I'm going to play you audio of Donald Trump saying bizarre shit.
predictions.context: Chad is arguing that Trump has misspoken gibberish like Biden. He commits to providing evidence in the next episode.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Merrick Garland... is going to get a note for impeachment pretty soon.
predictions.context: Bob claims the Hunter Biden case is a DOJ conspiracy and predicts Attorney General Merrick Garland will be impeached.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: We actually think that Hunter Biden is going to flip on the big guy... because somebody's going to prison.
predictions.context: Mary Lou predicts Hunter Biden will testify against his father, President Joe Biden, to avoid prison himself.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: And one of those two [Hunter or Joe Biden] is going to jail.
predictions.context: Bob asserts that the legal pressure on Hunter Biden will result in imprisonment for either Hunter or President Biden.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: As soon as they come out of that deal with this guy today, Joe Biden is going to have more to answer for than he can... he's going to get the impeachment's going to start.
predictions.context: Bob references closed-door hearings about Hunter Biden's business dealings and predicts they will lead to Joe Biden's impeachment.

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: They're going to talk about this [UFOs/UAPs] at the debates.
predictions.context: Haley argues that the recent congressional UFO hearings have made the topic a major issue that will be discussed in the upcoming presidential debates.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Every presidential candidate is going to have to have a stance on this. This is going to be part of the debates now.
predictions.context: Chad agrees with Haley, predicting that UFOs/UAPs will become a mandatory topic for all candidates in the presidential debates.

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: There will come a day where... tick tocks is full of fucking alien bodies and shit... I think in our lifetime for sure.
predictions.context: Haley believes the government's slow disclosure about UFOs will eventually lead to widespread public evidence of alien life.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: I literally think it's going to be in the next year.
predictions.context: Chad predicts that photographic evidence of 'non-human biologics' (alien bodies) will be revealed within a year.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: I bet it will come out to where... He's [Elon Musk] going to make us all pay for [Twitter/X].
predictions.context: Discussing Elon Musk's changes to Twitter, Mary Lou predicts the platform will eventually become universally paywalled.

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: I think he's [Elon Musk] probably going to sell it [Twitter/X] at some point and somebody will probably... turn it back into Twitter.
predictions.context: Haley predicts Elon Musk will eventually sell X (formerly Twitter) and the new owner will revert to the old brand.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: This [the 2024 presidential election] is going to be the biggest ass kicking in history.
predictions.context: Bob predicts a massive, historic victory for Donald Trump in the 2024 election.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: We're either going to win or we're going to start shooting.
predictions.context: Bob predicts that if Trump does not win the 2024 election, his supporters will resort to armed violence.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: ISIS... they're going to be [in the United States] now.
predictions.context: After mentioning an ISIS attack in Pakistan, Bob predicts the group will carry out attacks within the United States.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If we don't win the next election, we're probably moving... We won't stay here.
predictions.context: Mary Lou predicts she and Bob will leave the United States if Donald Trump does not win the 2024 presidential election.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: The first states that are going to start taking the lead are New York and California. Big time.
predictions.context: Bob predicts that civil unrest or conflict will begin in the states of New York and California.
